message:
feat(ui): add visual separation between Featured and Browse sections

- Add "Featured Prompts" heading with "Curated by the team" subtitle
- Add border-bottom to Featured section for visual separation
- Add gradient divider between Featured and Browse sections
- Add "Browse All Prompts" section header with subtitle
- Update results count to be contextual (shows filtering state)
- When no filters active, show simple "Showing all X prompts" message

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-3fms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
